title: When to get help
content:
You can write a great CV yourself with this app. But sometimes a professional review is worth it - senior roles, career pivots, or when you've sent dozens of applications with no callbacks and want an expert eye.

A good service reframes your experience, tightens the language, and checks ATS-readiness; some bundle interview coaching. Weigh the cost against where you are in the search.

*(This lesson links to recommended review services. Links are affiliate links - they don't change what you pay.)*
